blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 5 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the privacy-first storage requirement.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the privacy-first storage requirement.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for privacy-first storage of sensitive identifiers, but the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding how sensitive identifiers are stored or hashed. Without concrete evidence or checks confirming this requirement, the validation cannot be completed, leading to an inconclusive result. The absence of specific evidence related to the storage and hashing of sensitive identifiers indicates a gap in the requirement's coverage.
